titleStmt.title: Mr. Clay to to Mr. Seward

div.head: Mr. Clay to Mr. Seward
div.p: Sir: Some time since I gave you a compend of the expenditures of the Russian empire for the year 1863, with a promise of the revenues. Until now I have been unable to get the data.

postscript.p: Hon. William H. Seward, Secretary of State, Washington, D. C.

frus:attachment.head: Revenues for 1864.
frus:attachment.p: Receipts and expenses of the year 1864.

row.cell: Department of the establishment of the Emperor
Admin. of colonies of the south
Department of public roads and buildings
Department of the cavalry of the empire
a. Chargeable upon the revenue of the country
b. Chargeable on the funds of treasury
Disbursements militaires extraordinaires carried to the end of the budget

closer.signed: Minister of Finance, Secretary of State, DE REUTERN.
